AI Video & Audio

AI tools for video production, voice synthesis, and audio. Real project testing, not marketing demos.

Quick Comparison

Tool Maker Rating Price Best For
Runway Gen-4 Runway ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.6 $12-36/mo Best AI video generation overall
Kling AI 2.0 Kuaishou ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.4 Free / $10/mo Best free tier, strong motion quality
Sora OpenAI ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.3 $20/mo (ChatGPT Plus) Best for ChatGPT-integrated video
Pika 2.0 Pika Labs ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.1 $8/mo Best for quick video edits and effects
Descript AI Descript ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.3 $24/mo Edit video by editing text, best for podcasts
ElevenLabs ElevenLabs ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.5 $5/mo Best AI voice synthesis, 32 languages
HeyGen HeyGen ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 3.9 $24/mo Best AI avatar video creation
Suno v4 Suno ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.2 $10/mo Best AI music generation, full songs
